name: Dictava

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
This release addresses community plugin review feedback and improves release provenance.

### Changes

- Added GitHub artifact attestations for release assets.
- Replaced the `builtin-modules` package with Node’s built-in `node:module` API.
- Fixed TypeScript warnings.
- Fixed manifest

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
This release corrects the minimum supported Obsidian version.

### Changes

- Updated the minimum required Obsidian version from `1.5.0` to `1.11.4`.

### Requirements

- Obsidian 1.11.4 or later.
- A Dictava account and API key.

### Network use

Unchanged from 0.1.0. The plugin connects to the `https://dictava.com` API to fetch artifact deliveries scoped to your vault. Vault contents are never sent.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# 0.1.0 - first release

Dictava syncs voice-note artifacts (created from voice messages you send to the Dictava Telegram bot) into your Obsidian vault.

## Requirements

- Obsidian 1.5.0 or later.
- A Dictava account and API key.

## Network use

Connects to `https://dictava.com` API to fetch artifact deliveries scoped to your vault. Vault contents are never sent. See the README for the full list of endpoints and the privacy policy link.
